attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT NGCCRM_MA_LINES.MA_HDR_ID, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.MA_LINE_ID, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.LINE_TYPE, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ELEMENT_TYPE, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.RC_ID, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.SRC_ID, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.RC_TYPE, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.RC_NAME, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.SRC_NAME, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ACCOUNTING_RULE, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.DEF_POSTED, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.DEF_UNPOSTED, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.TOTAL_DEF, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.DEF_COMMENT, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.REL_POSTED, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.REL_UNPOSTED, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.TOTAL_REL, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.RELEASE_COMMENT, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.NET_DEF_POSTED, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.NET_DEF_UNPOSTED, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.NET_DEF, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.PROV_POSTED, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.PROV_UNPOSTED, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.NET_PROV, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.PROV_COMMENT, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.PROV_CHANNEL_FLAG, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.PROV_REL_TYPE, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.PROV_REL_POSTED, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.PROV_REL_UNPOSTED, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.USAGE_RECLASS_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.NET_PROV_REL, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.PROV_REL_COMMENT, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.PROV_REL_CHANNEL_FLAG, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.NET_PRO_POSTED, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.NET_PRO_UNPOSTED, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.NET_PRO, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.TOT_NET_DEF_PRO_POSTED, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.TOT_NET_DEF_PRO_UNPOSTED, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.TOT_NET_DEF_PRO, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.CREATE_BY, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.CREATION_DATE, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.START_PERIOD, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.FISCAL_PERIOD, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ATTRIBUTE_CAT, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ATTRIBUTE1, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ATTRIBUTE2, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ATTRIBUTE3, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ATTRIBUTE4, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ATTRIBUTE5, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ATTRIBUTE6, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ATTRIBUTE7, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ATTRIBUTE8, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ATTRIBUTE9, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ATTRIBUTE10, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ATTRIBUTE11, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ATTRIBUTE12, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ATTRIBUTE13, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ATTRIBUTE14, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.ATTRIBUTE15, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.LATEST_RAE_ID, NGCCRM_MA_LINES.LAST_TRANSACTION_ID,
NGCCRM_MA_LINES.USAGE_AMT,
NGCCRM_MA_LINES.RECLASS_AMT
FROM
 NGCCRM_MA_LINES_MV  NGCCRM_MA_LINES
WHERE LAST_UPDATE_DATE > TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
